{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230323522C354B1BE286544D89BD"}"},"total":982},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7129954011041743648","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本是我看过可以这么说，番茄里面第一本好看的关于九叔的类型的小说，第一点主角性格和做事风格都很好，唯独直男的一点都很好，剧情很通畅，和其他电影缝合的也很好，唯一一本超好看的，作者加油，加油加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660072270,"group_id":"7113819611602095137","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"逼之巅,冻世间,待我玄冰冻穿天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4f3AxYJ5hoofw7Ml4sq1D7C3Ci9WlNNg9VIxFbLezoy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c8416752e14749e29fea49b59b3a0bd3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788090&x-signature=5fAw3HtsInMML%2FjgVYw9A777%2BOk%3D","user_id":"1645324543722691","user_name":"炸天帮〖冰寒仙帝〗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1645324543722691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1653586204,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7113819611602095137","book_info":{"abstract":"徐扬穿越到九叔世界。
刚穿越，就碰到了妖物？
危急之际。
【叮，检测到百年白狐精，至尊功德系统开启！】
【叮，恭喜宿主获得先天道根！】
徐扬：系统，你开启，我很欣慰，但只有先天道根，我不高兴！
没有法力，不还是死路一条？
正当徐扬濒临危险之时，九叔出现了！
